message:
chore: update workspace lockfile, manifest, docs, and spec visualization

- Cargo.toml: update workspace-level dependency versions
- Cargo.lock: regenerate lockfile with 528 new/updated entries reflecting
  the expanded crate dependency trees (libc, nix, criterion, trybuild, etc.)
- raptorq_permeation_map_checklist.md: update permeation map to reflect
  newly implemented modules across btree, func, mvcc, pager, vfs, and wal
- spec visualization HTML: update the interactive evolution timeline to
  include the latest spec revision

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
